    com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing  

    • Uses of SignalProcessingException in com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing

      Methods in com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing that throw SignalProcessingException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix KalmanFilter.correct(com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix measurement)
      Adjusts model state.
      com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix KalmanFilter.predict()
      Estimates subsequent model state without control parameteres.
      com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix KalmanFilter.predict(com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix control)
      Estimates subsequent model state.
      void KalmanFilter.setMeasureParameters(int measureParameters)
      Sets the number of measurement vector dimensions (measure parameters).
      com.irurueta.algebra.Matrix MeasurementNoiseCovarianceEstimator.update(double[] sample)
      Updates currently estimated covariance matrix by adding provided sample data.
      Constructors in com.irurueta.numerical.signal.processing that throw SignalProcessingException 
      Constructor and Description
      KalmanFilter(int dynamParams, int measureParams)
      Constructor in case of no control parameters.
      KalmanFilter(int dynamParams, int measureParams, int controlParams)
      Allocates a Kalman filter and all its matrices and initializes them.
